title: Adaptive Visuals (PVP)
description: A mod that adds beautiful visuals to your game and makes your Minecraft much more convenient.
body:
![Requires Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b8424983761bf387a995fc1cbecef3ca6704a5b.png)

[![Telegram](https://img.shields.io/badge/Telegram-Adaptive_Visuals-2AABEE?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)](https://t.me/adaptive_visuals) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/xxiwIqMx?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/controlplayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/adaptive-visuals-(pvp)))


## ✨ Features

Adaptive Visuals is a comprehensive visual enhancement mod that brings your Minecraft experience to the next level with:

* **Combat Enhancements** — Beautiful hit particles, hit waves, customizable colors, and improved combat visuals
* **Visual Effects** — Target ESP, block overlays, jump circles, player trails, and enhanced world effects
* **Gameplay Improvements** — Inventory highlights, shulker preview, armor viewer, and useful in-game utilities
* **Interface Upgrades** — Custom UI, improved animations, better category navigation, enhanced color picker, and chat anti-spam
* **Social Features** — Friend manager and name protection system
* **Server Utilities** — Auto-login, clan investment, and slot protection for supported servers
* **Movement Features** — Auto sprint and other quality-of-life movement options
* **Utility Commands** — Built-in tools and helpful commands

All features are fully customizable through an intuitive ClickGUI interface!
